description_long: This is an irregularly shaped, flat stone fragment with a roughly triangular profile and a predominantly light beige coloration. The surface is speckled with small, darker mineral inclusions and subtle veins, giving it a natural, unpolished appearance. One side of the stone displays a patch of rusty orange-brown staining, likely from iron oxide or weathering. Black alphanumeric markings are visible on two faces, suggesting cataloging or identification for research or archival purposes. The edges are jagged and uneven, with some areas appearing freshly broken, while others show minor smoothing. The stone's overall texture is rough and granular, typical of sedimentary or quartz-based rocks found in urban landscaping or construction debris.
description: A flat, irregular beige stone fragment with speckled inclusions, rusty stains, and black catalog markings. Its rough, jagged edges and granular texture suggest natural weathering and recent breakage.
description_view_0: Flat, broad face of the stone showing beige coloration with speckled inclusions and subtle veining.
description_view_1: Edge view highlighting the stone's thickness, rough break lines, and visible black catalog markings.
description_view_2: Side view showing the rusty orange-brown staining, more catalog numbers, and the stone's uneven profile.
description_view_3: Narrow end of the stone with prominent 'BBS' marking and a mix of beige and orange-brown coloration.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or scattered among other stones
attribute_pattern: Speckled with small mineral inclusions and faint veining; black alphanumeric markings are present on two faces.
attribute_weathering: Edges are jagged with some minor smoothing, surface is rough and granular with rusty staining indicating moderate weathering.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with man-made surfaces but may blend with other natural stones or landscaping materials; catalog markings make it stand out in a curated setting.

license_info.creator_display_name: UQ School of Earth and Environmental Sciences
